pricingPage.title: Pricing Plans
pricingPage.subtitleSignup: Create your account to get started
pricingPage.subtitle: Choose the plan that's right for your organization

basicPlan.name: Basic
basicPlan.description: Get immediate access to suppliers, compliance guidance, and support—everything you need to operate smoothly at a low cost.

essentialPlan.name: Essential
essentialPlan.tagline: Save time with ready-to-go parent and HR workflows.
essentialPlan.description: Win parents faster, stay compliant, and manage enquiries with ease—all from one simple dashboard.

features.enquiryTracker: Parent enquiry tracker with quick replies

professionalPlan.name: Professional
professionalPlan.tagline: Grow confidently with full recruitment and training support.
professionalPlan.description: Recruit and train staff, handle unlimited parent enquiries, and deliver excellence without adding admin burden.

enterprisePlan.name: Enterprise
enterprisePlan.tagline: Scale across sites with automation and premium support.
enterprisePlan.description: Operate multiple locations with consistent quality thanks to analytics, integrations, and dedicated experts.

suppliersPlan.name: Suppliers
suppliersPlan.tagline: Fair, simple pricing to reach Swiss daycares.
suppliersPlan.description: Promote your catalogue, manage leads, and track sales performance from one place.

serviceProviderPlan.name: Service Providers
serviceProviderPlan.tagline: Build lasting partnerships with professional daycares.
serviceProviderPlan.description: Schedule appointments, manage client pipelines, and grow recurring revenue with childcare operators.
